rationale: Both correctly land on the ground-truth resolution (PR #4792 fixing the non-async-chunk None-payload starvation, already folded into the v0.24 rebase) and quote the same code snippet from akshatvishu's comment near-verbatim. Y grounds the mechanism more deeply across multiple files (coordinator gating, timeout log strings, mm_outputs partition helper) and engages more concretely with the reporter's specific environment/log details, whereas X's grounding is thinner and includes a suspicious, likely-fabricated unit-test name as 'verification' that isn't tied to the actual fix. Y's answer is also more complete, giving a clear verdict, an explicit workaround retaining the user's config, and next steps if the issue persists.
